headline: American International Shows Strong Underwriting Growth: Buy or Hold?
summary: AIG streamlines toward General Insurance, posts stronger underwriting and $6.8B shareholder returns, while analysts see 12.7% upside to the stock.

headline: American International Group, Inc. (AIG) Price Target Raised to $90 at Goldman Sachs
summary: American International Group, Inc. (NYSE:AIG) is among the 12 Best Very Cheap Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 5, Goldman Sachs upgraded American International Group, Inc. (NYSE:AIG) to Buy from Neutral and raised its price target to $90 from $83, implying roughly 16% total return potential. The firm noted that AIG offers industry-leading earnings […]
